title: dryopteris glabrata
intro: Dryopteris glabrata, also known as Smooth Wood Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Dryopteris genus and is native to Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris glabrata include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
